_meta.name: Page Number Rules
_meta.description: Page numbering placement and formatting rules

P-001.description: Do not place a page number on page 1

P-002.description: Page numbers on page 2+ are centered horizontally, 1/2 inch from bottom edge

P-003.description: Plain number only - no hyphens, no punctuation, no 'Page' prefix

P-004.description: Continuation pages (page 2+) repeat the subject line at top

P-005.description: Text resumes on the second line below the repeated subject line

P-006.description: Do not draw letterhead, SSIC/date, From/To/Via/Ref/Encl on continuation pages
